description: Harmonic memory write-side gate: 20 facts across 5 gold topics, each topic phrased several different ways to test whether consolidation clusters related facts under one canonical abstraction.

facts.content: I'm a vegetarian and don't eat any meat at all.
Please keep fish and seafood out of any recipe suggestions for me.
I do eat eggs and dairy, just nothing with animal flesh.
When we order lunch, I need a meat-free option every time.
Project Orion officially kicks off in March next year.
The first Orion milestone is shipping the public API.
We pushed the Orion launch date back to the third quarter.
Orion's beta review is scheduled two weeks before launch.
Sarah is the lead engineer on our team.
Sarah reports directly to the CTO.
The engineering team currently has five developers.
Priya recently joined us as the product designer.
I always prefer a window seat when I fly.
Book me on early morning departures whenever possible.
I like to keep layovers under two hours.
For hotels I want something within walking distance of the venue.
My home desk has two monitors side by side.
I use a mechanical keyboard and a vertical mouse at home.
There's a standing desk in my home office that I raise most afternoons.
My home internet runs on a wired gigabit connection.
